name: torque_closure_feasibility
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceTorqueClosureFeasibility records whether rotor yaw-torque scaling alone can close powered-source wake energy demand.
note: Primary torque-closure feasibility audit.

name: drone_config_presets
value: DroneConfig supplies racingQuad apDrone cinewhoop and heavyLift rotor thrust torque battery and preset constants.
note: Preset physical parameter source.

name: rotor_spec
value: RotorSpec supplies maximum angular velocity yaw torque per thrust radius blade geometry and spin direction.
note: Rotor torque and geometry source.

name: hover_source_map
value: Powered hover source map supplies hover spin ratio axial momentum power and per-rotor source terms.
note: Hover source-map input.

name: hover_wake_footprint
value: Powered hover wake footprint supplies mass flow and far wake radius for swirl-power terms.
note: Hover wake-footprint input.

name: cruise_source_map
value: Powered cruise source map supplies cruise spin ratio axial momentum power and per-rotor source terms.
note: Cruise source-map input.

name: cruise_wake_footprint
value: Powered cruise wake footprint supplies mass flow and far wake radius for skew-wake swirl-power terms.
note: Cruise wake-footprint input.

name: shaft_power_budget
value: Powered source shaft-power budget supplies the aggregate precursor showing per-preset deficits before torque-closure decomposition.
note: Precursor energy-budget audit.

name: aerodynamics4mc_core_reference
value: Aerodynamics4MC-Core remains the upstream L2 wind and force-moment reference for future source-term support.
note: Upstream A4MC reference repository.

name: torque_scale_energy_band
value: q*S - (M + q^2*W) >= 0; negative discriminant means yaw-torque coefficient scaling alone cannot make the powered-source wake target pay for axial plus swirl power.
note: Use this packet before treating shaft-power budget deficits as a simple motor torque constant fit.
